description_long: This is a stylized female pedestrian figure with a youthful appearance, featuring a slim build and fair skin. She wears a short-sleeved sailor-style top with a prominent collar and a bow at the chest, paired with short shorts. Her legs and arms are exposed, and she stands in a neutral, upright pose with arms slightly outstretched. The character's hair is styled in two symmetrical buns on either side of her head, with some loose strands framing her face. Her facial features are large and expressive, typical of anime-inspired designs, and she appears to be wearing no visible accessories or carried items. The overall look is casual and suitable for a warm urban environment, such as a park or sidewalk.
description: A stylized young woman in a sailor-style top and shorts, standing upright with arms outstretched and hair in twin buns. She has a slim build and an anime-inspired appearance.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the sailor collar, short shorts, and twin bun hairstyle.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the arm's length, and the side of the sailor top.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the expressive face, bow detail on the chest, and the full front of the outfit.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the profile and the side of the clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeved sailor-style top with collar and bow, short shorts
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length hair styled in twin buns with loose front strands
